made all the more difficult to buy that settling rain which at some points actually became standing puddles the intermediate check just before the 10 kilometer to go marker 14.8 to be completed and DSM did a fantastic job the thermalek boys got their heads down played with the conditions which suited them and indeed some parts of the course because the inherent heat held within the tarmac after same thing had happened to people Ghana on the course and the night was coming jumbo at least finished with some vision but 32 seconds down having to wait for teammates who've been hobbled DSM in the hot seat well almost owned the place by a margin of six seconds at that margin I'm about to set off were UE team Emirates high hopes for them as well with ayuzo and Xiao Armada they amongst the favorites to knock at the door of the likes of roglitch bingo girl and Evan apoll in the end 37 seconds was given away and Xiao al-mada had actually Fallen needed a bike change and his team didn't wait for him well lots to be considered by the end of the day one of which is that movie star look absolutely on song this was a brilliant ride from Emerick mass and his team and in fact it looked good enough to take the day and had there not been some separation in the last 150 meters you just never know only half a second separating themselves from DSM fermineck who still LED still to start and some nervous looks on the faces of pseudo quickstep the defending Champion Remco Emma Paul by the end of the day was absolutely livid through standing water they went and indeed more than that it was the darkness that upset them they kept it together and indeed by the time they look at the results they'll see a lot of big names finishing behind them but it did not stop the anger from bubbling to the surface joy for DSM not the same of course forever Nepal well his views aired roundly for the leads of this race team competition the youth jersey and of course the coveted leaders jersey belong to team DSM and it's an Italian who wears red as we head back to Barcelona tomorrow Lorenzo milesie it is we thought it might be Filippo Garner but no so we have our leader it is melessi going into the second stage thunderstorms expected to intensify overnight which is going to cause a worry to absolutely everybody and this is what we're dealing with matara and then back to Barcelona it's not a short stage either 182 kilometers we will have a climber's jersey at the end of the day and the last little lump in a technical finale will make matters all the more challenging the rain came it hasn't dampened our enthusiasm and we race on tomorrow but this was certainly a trial foreign
